Metadata.title: Risking - Project Status
Metadata.description: Track the progress of the Risking digital adaptation and see what's coming next.

HomePage.heading: Risking: The Game
HomePage.descriptionBody: Risking is a non-digital card game designed to teach risk management in software projects. Players take on the role of project managers, using cards to simulate the emergence of risks (attacks) and the application of solutions to mitigate them (defenses). Each round is a challenge of strategy and knowledge, where players must identify the best way to handle the problems that arise.
HomePage.statusBody: The project is currently in the initial phase of digital adaptation. We have analyzed the original paper that proposed the game and are now structuring the foundational elements for the software version.
HomePage.nextStepsIntro: Our immediate focus is on the following tasks:

nextStepsItems.architecture: Plan the software architecture to be used.
nextStepsItems.design: Develop the design system and the user interface (UI/UX) concepts.
nextStepsItems.prototype: Create a playable prototype with the core game mechanics.
nextStepsItems.stack: Define the technology stack for development.

PlaygroundMetadata.title: Risking - Backend Playground
PlaygroundMetadata.description: Interact with the backend endpoints directly from the browser to validate the API quickly.

PlaygroundPage.heading: Backend playground
PlaygroundPage.intro: Use the tools below to trigger backend endpoints and inspect the responses without leaving the browser.

authSection.heading: Authentication
authSection.description: Create test users or reuse existing accounts to manage tokens.

sessionsSection.heading: Sessions
sessionsSection.description: Create lobbies and run through the current session workflow.
sessionsSection.startHint: Requires you to be the host and have at least three players in the lobby.

tokens.heading: Tokens
tokens.description: Tokens live only in memory. Paste, edit, or clear them as you need.

latestResult.heading: Latest response
latestResult.empty: Trigger any request to inspect the payload.

errors.missingBaseUrl: Provide the API base URL before calling endpoints.
errors.missingAccessToken: Set an access token first (register or login).
errors.missingRefreshToken: Set a refresh token before refreshing.
errors.missingSessionId: Fill in a session ID to continue.
